news.paragraph: TLT holders have experienced significant losses, with recent articles highlighting a potential 50% decline and emphasizing the risks of long-dated Treasuries. Analysts suggest defensive strategies and note that rising Treasury yields reflect a market recalibration, with some trades betting on further weakness in TLT. The overall sentiment points to continued pressure on the ETF.
